methodsAttempted.query: QS 281-330 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and targeted official page extraction were used. Course syllabi, dissertations, generic AI literacy pages, and non-endorsed tool lists were not expanded into allowed tool records.

artifacts.summary: QS281-330 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for CU Boulder, Rutgers, University of Oulu, and City St George's. Other schools in the band were not expanded without explicit public tool-level official evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: ChatGPT Edu - Office of Information Technology
Microsoft 365 Copilot - Artificial Intelligence at Rutgers
List of AI Tools Maintained by ICT Services - University of Oulu
AI tools and techniques for study - City St George's Library guides

stopConditions: Stop after official source-backed tool-level evidence is captured.
Do not expand broad AI guidance, course policies, dissertations, training pages, or research PDFs into named tool availability records.

artifacts.title: QS281-330 AI tools crawl report
artifacts.summary: Staged QS281-330 official AI tools records and left universities without explicit tool-level official evidence unexpanded.
limitations: Tool records are tracker-derived metadata and do not replace official university source language.
The pass only expands official public tool-level evidence, not broad AI guidance, training examples, course policies, dissertations, or generic tool mentions.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
